name: Pipeline Length Threshold
description: Pipeline exceeds 40 km in a new right-of-way

name: Gas Pipeline Capacity Threshold
description: Natural gas pipeline with capacity exceeding 500,000 cubic metres per day

name: Navigable Watercourse Crossing
description: Project involves crossing or altering a navigable waterway

name: Indigenous Territory
description: Project is located in or near established or asserted Indigenous territory

name: Caribou Critical Habitat
description: Project footprint overlaps with caribou critical habitat identified under SARA recovery strategy
regulatory_ref: Species at Risk Act, Federal Recovery Strategy

name: Mine Production Rate Threshold
description: Metal mine with ore production capacity of 5,000 tonnes or more per day

name: Dam Height Threshold
description: Dam with a height of 15 metres or more creating a reservoir of 10 million m3 or more
